creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Mel, hi Joerg,

the PR ports/116586 (see [1]) has been around unchanged for over a year -
does the problem still exist and/or has there been a conclusion how to fix
it? Please let me know what the state of this problem is.

Best regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/116586
